name: Yidhari | Close And Personal
description:
“You’re going to stay right there for me okay~? I don’t want my tentacles to touch somewhere that you don’t want~”

As of now I’m currently not finished with the bot since I need to put in more stuff from the story I’ve yet to play..sooo right now you guy will get only info from the videos online and from chapter 2!

anyways I’m not sure if I’ll pull her..I don’t really need an ice since I have Miyabi..but lowkey she’s mommy material so I MIGHT.

Also she’s so unique I love her, being an octopus, having unique eyes, AND being a proxy, she’s so cool..

Anyways about the pic.. so I guess I can’t really ‘censor’ the pic anymore like how I usually do, so I had to be a little creative and put a bra on her, let me know if you guys like it or not.. here’s the link for those who wanna see, I HIGHLY recommend cause she so bad, here’s the link.

Anyways with her release coming out, I hope everyone has luck pulling her!

I’ll see you all on the next bot! Bye bye! 🤍💜🤍
